slides.eyebrow: Mophato wa 11 Hisitori - Legato la FET
slides.title: Dikakanyo tsa Semorafe mo Mafelong a Lekgolo la bo-19 le la bo-20 la Dingwaga
slides.lead: Ka fa Ma-Yuropa a neng a itlhamela saense ya maaka ya 'semorafe' ka teng, le ka fa dikakanyo tseo di neng tsa fetolwa melao, mebuso e megolo, mme kwa bofelong, polao ya morafe (genocide).

media.alt: Sedirisiwa sa go lekanya (callipers) se se beilweng mo sebopegong sa motho, se tshwantshetsa saense ya maaka ya go lekanya semorafe.

slides.notes: Simolola ka go tlhalosa sentle kgang ya konokono ya setlhogo sotlhe: 'semorafe' ga se nnete ya baeoloji mme ke kakanyo ya loago le ya sepolotiki e e agilweng ke batho, bogolo jang go itshireletsa maatla le tlhaelo ya tekatekano. Bontsha tselana ya thuto - go arola ka ditlhopha, morago saense ya maaka (Social Darwinism, eugenics), morago pholisi le thubakanyo (polao ya morafe ya bokoloniale, Jeremane ya Bo-Nazi, le dikamano le Aforika Borwa). Tlhoma potso ya tokololo ya maemo a FET: dikakanyo di nna ditlamorago jang?

slides.title: Re raya eng ka 'semorafe'?
slides.lead: Saense ya sešwa e dumalana gore ga go na motheo wa baeoloji wa go kgaoganya batho ka 'merafe' e e farologaneng.

blocks.text: **Semorafe** ke mokgwa wa go bopaganya batho go ya ka dipopego tsa mmele jaaka mmala wa letlalo. Go utlwala go le tlholego, mme ke **sebopiwa sa loago** - kakanyo e e bopilweng ke ditshaba, e seng nnete e e fitlhelwang mo baeoloji. Batho ba abelana go feta 99.9% ya DNA ya bone, mme go na le pharologano ya boloko e e ntsi go feta *mo teng* ga setlhopha sengwe le sengwe se se bidiwang sa semorafe go na le *fa gare* ga ditlhopha.

items: **Kgethololo ya semorafe (racism)** ke tumelo ya gore ditlhopha tse di ka bewa ka maemo, mangwe a le 'kwa godimo' go a mangwe.
Mo dingwageng tsa bo-1800, Ma-Yuropa a ne a apesa tumelo e ka puo ya saense.
Kgethololo e ya 'saense' e ne ya dirisiwa go itshireletsa bokgoba, mebuso e megolo mme moragonyana, polao e kgolo ya batho.

slides.notes: Farologanya sentle mareo a mararo a baithuti ba se tshwanelang go a tlhakanya: semorafe (setlhopha), kgethololo ya semorafe (thulaganyo ya tumelo ya go beela maemo), le kgethololo ya semorafe ya saense/ya saense ya maaka (maiteko a go supa go beela maemo ka saense). Gatelela gore go bitsa semorafe 'sebopiwa sa loago' ga go kaye gore kgethololo ya semorafe ke ya boitshamiso - ditlamorago tsa yona ke nnete e e setlhogo. Tlhalosa gore ke ka ntlha yang saense e ne e le ncho mo ditlhopheng tse di nang le maatla: e ne e dira gore tlhaelo ya tekatekano e lebege e le tlholego go na le boitshwaro jwa go itlhophela.

slides.eyebrow: Medi ya Kganya (Enlightenment) - lekgolo la bo-18 la dingwaga
slides.title: Go arola batho ka ditlhopha
slides.lead: Ditsebi tsa tlholego tsa Yuropa di ne tsa simolola go arola batho ka mefuta e e sa fetogeng - mme ka setu di ba beela ka maemo.

blocks.text: Mo nakong ya Kganya (Enlightenment), borasaense ba ne ba leka go arola dilo tsotlhe tse di tshelang ka ditlhopha. **Carl Linnaeus** (1735) le **Johann Blumenbach** (1795) ba ne ba kgaoganya batho ka 'mefuta' e se kae go ya ka mmala wa letlalo le sebopego sa logata. Blumenbach o ne a tlhama lereo *Caucasian* mme, se se botlhokwa, a baya Ma-Yuropa kwa godimo ga leano la gagwe.

items: Go arola go ne go lebega go se na letlhakore, mme go ne go agile **tatelano ya maemo** e Ma-Yuropa a leng sekao se se molemo.
Ditlhopha tse di ne di bopilwe ke paka ya bokgoba le mebuso e megolo e e neng e anama.
Baakanyi ba moragonyana ba ne ba tshwara mefuta e e itlhamilweng jaaka e ka bo e ne e sa fetoge e bile e le ya tlholego.

media.alt: Dikgetsana tse nne tse di nang le maina tse di beilweng jaaka pyramid ya maemo, di emela ditlhopha tsa semorafe tse di itlhamilweng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='84' y='24' width='52' height='26' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='64' y='58' width='92' height='26' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='44' y='92' width='132' height='26' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='24' y='126' width='172' height='26' fill='#b7a98d'/><line x1='110' y1='18' x2='110' y2='152' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bontsha tiro e e fitlhilweng: go arola (go rulaganya) go ne ga fetogela mo tatelanong ya maemo (go beela maemo) go se na bosupi bope jwa go beela maemo. Blumenbach ka boene o ne a se na tatelano ya maemo go feta ba ba mo dirisitseng, mme balatedi ba gagwe ba ne ba thatafatsa ditlhopha tsa gagwe - se ke sekao se se molemo sa ka fa saense e ka sokamisiwang go direla kgethololo. [SME] Netefatsa matlha/ditumelelano tse di tota (Linnaeus 1735 Systema Naturae; Blumenbach 1795 kgatiso) kgatlhanong le atikele ya SAHO pele ga tlhagiso.

slides.eyebrow: Saense ya maaka - lekgolo la bo-19 la dingwaga
slides.title: Kgethololo ya semorafe ya saense
slides.lead: Go lekanya megata le mebele go 'supa' tatelano ya maemo e e neng e setse e swetswe pele ga nako.

blocks.text: Mo dingwageng tsa bo-1800, batho ba kgethololo ba ne ba dirisa didirisiwa jaaka **craniometry** (go lekanya bogolo jwa logata) le **phrenology** (go bala dikuku mo tlhogong) go bolela gore ditlhopha dingwe di botlhale go feta tse dingwe. Re bitsa se **kgethololo ya semorafe ya saense ya maaka** ka gonne e ne e dirisa *tebego* ya saense mme e itlhokomolosa mokgwa o o siameng - bafaladi ba dipatlisiso ba ne ba batla bosupi go netefatsa se ba neng ba setse ba se dumela.

items: Datha e ne e tlhophiwa, e badiwa phoso kgotsa e itlhamiwa go ema nokeng bogolo jwa Ma-Yuropa.
Tshwetso (tatelano ya maemo ya semorafe) e ne e tsewa e le boammaaruri pele ga 'dipatlisiso' di simologa.
E ne ya naya bokgoba, phenyo ya bokoloniale le kgethologanyo mabaka a a tlotlegang, a 'saense'.

media.alt: Logata fa thoko ga sedirisiwa sa go lekanya (dividers) le sedirisiwa sa go lekanya (ruler).
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 46 q40 -20 66 8 q20 22 6 50 q-6 12 -22 12 h-8 v14 h-14 v-14 h-10 q-20 0 -26 -22 q-8 -30 8 -48 Z' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='84' cy='78' r='8' fill='#5c1414'/><circle cx='110' cy='80' r='7' fill='#5c1414'/><line x1='168' y1='30' x2='150' y2='120' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='188' y1='30' x2='150' y2='120' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='168' y1='30' x2='188' y2='30' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gatelela bothata jwa mokgwa, ka gonne ke pelo ya kgopolo: saense ya maaka e sokolola tsamaiso ya saense ka go simolola ka karabo mme e batla tshegetso. Craniometry (sekao dikokoanyo tsa megata tsa bafaladi ba dipatlisiso jaaka Samuel Morton) moragonyana e ne ya bontshiwa e tletse tlhotlhelo le diphoso. Golaganya le bokgoni jwa FET jwa go sekaseka go ikanyega ga metswedi - bao e ne e le 'ditsebi' tse taolo ya bone e neng ya dirisiwa ka phoso.

slides.eyebrow: Go dirisa Darwin ka phoso - go tloga ka 1859
slides.title: Social Darwinism
slides.lead: Go sokamisa tiori kaga tlholego go nna lebaka la setlhogo sa batho.

blocks.text: Buka ya ga Charles Darwin ya *On the Origin of Species* (1859) e ne ya tlhalosa ka fa mefuta ya diphedi e fetogang ka teng ka tlhopho ya tlholego. Ba bangwe - segolo bogolo **Herbert Spencer**, yo o neng a tlhama polelwana *survival of the fittest* (go phela ga ba ba nonofileng thata) - ba ne ba dirisa se ka phoso mo ditshabeng tsa batho. **Social Darwinism** e ne ya bolela gore ditšhaba tse di humileng, magato le 'merafe' di ne di laola ka gonne di ne di le kwa godimo ka tlholego.

items: E ne ya bontsha tlhaelo ya tekatekano le lehuma jaaka dilo tsa tlholego e bile di tlhokega.
E ne ya itshireletsa bommušu (imperialism): phenyo e ne e tsewa jaaka ba ba 'nonofileng' ba fenya ba ba 'bokoa'.
Baeoloji ya ga Darwin e ne ya sokamisiwa; o ne a sa bolele gore batho bangwe ba tshwanetse go busa ba bangwe.

media.alt: Manamelo a dibara tse di tlhatlogang tse di nang le motswe, a akantsha lera la maaka la tswelopele.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='24' y='116' width='36' height='28' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='66' y='96' width='36' height='48' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='108' y='72' width='36' height='72' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='150' y='44' width='36' height='100' fill='#2f5233'/><path d='M30 108 L180 36' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M180 36 L168 40 M180 36 L176 50' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nna a a tlhomameng mo baithuting ba FET: Social Darwinism ke tiriso e e phoso ya Darwin, e seng pono ya ga Darwin ka boene (serai se se tlwaelegileng sa ditlhatlhobo). Ke Spencer, e seng Darwin, yo o tlhamileng 'survival of the fittest'. Tiro ya konokono ya kakanyo e ne e le ya megopolo - e ne e dira gore go aga mebuso e megolo ya Ma-Yuropa le tlhaelo e e setlhogo ya ikonomi di lebege di le melao ya tlholego e go seng ope yo o ka e ganetsang kgotsa a tshwanetseng go e ganetsa.

slides.title: Eugenics
slides.lead: Fa setšhaba se ka kgona go tlhagisa dijalo le dikgomo tse di botoka, bangwe ba ne ba ngangisana, ke ka ntlha yang re sa tlhagise batho ba ba 'botoka'?

blocks.text: **Eugenics** (go tswa mo Sekgerikeng se se rayang 'go tsholwa sentle') e ne ya rewa leina ke **Francis Galton**, motswala wa ga Darwin, ka 1883. E ne e ikaeletse go 'tokafatsa' palo ya batho ka go rotloetsa ba ba 'nonofileng' go tshola bana (*positive* eugenics) le go thibela ba ba 'sa nonofang' go dira jalo (*negative* eugenics) - ka kgethologanyo, dithibelo tsa lenyalo le go faposiwa ka dikgoka (forced sterilisation).

items: 'Ba ba sa nonofang' ba ne ba tlhalosiwa go akaretsa bahumanegi, ba ba golafetseng, ba ba lwalang mo tlhaloganyong le batho ba e seng basweu.
E ne ya fetola kgethololo ya semorafe ya saense ya maaka go nna **lenaneo la tiro ya puso**.
Ka mathaithai a bo-1900, eugenics e ne e tlwaelesegile e bile e tlotlwa kwa Yuropa le kwa USA.

media.alt: Setlhare sa lelapa se se kgabisitsweng se dikala dingwe di tshwailwe di bo di kgaotswe, se tshwantshetsa go tlhagisa ka tlhopho.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><line x1='110' y1='140' x2='110' y2='70' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='6'/><line x1='110' y1='84' x2='60' y2='44' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='110' y1='84' x2='160' y2='44' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='110' y1='104' x2='150' y2='96' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='60' cy='40' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='160' cy='40' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='154' cy='96' r='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><line x1='140' y1='82' x2='168' y2='110' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='168' y1='82' x2='140' y2='110' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Se ke selaete sa phetogo: eugenics ke fa dikakanyo tse di kotsi di fetogang maano a tiro ya puso kgatlhanong le batho ba nnete. Ela tlhoko gore eugenics e ne e se tumelo ya matlhakore - e ne e rutwa kwa diyunibesithing tse dikgolo e bile e tshegediwa ke borasaense ba ba tlotlegang, boradipolotiki le baitseanape ba diphetogo mo mafapheng otlhe a sepolotiki. Ke go tlotlega goo tota mo go neng ga e dira kotsi jaana. Bontsha e sa le gale gore dislaete tse pedi tse di latelang di bontsha eugenics e tsenngwa mo molaong.

slides.title: Eugenics kwa United States
slides.lead: Amerika e ne e le naga ya ntlha go fetola eugenics go nna pholisi e kgolo ya puso.

blocks.text: Go tloga ka 1907, dinaga tsa USA di ne tsa ntsha melao ya go **faposa ka dikgoka** batho ba ba atlholwang ba 'sa nonofa'. Mo tshekong ya 1927 ya *Buck v. Bell*, Kgotlatshekelo e Kgolo e ne ya dumela go faposiwa, mme Moatlhodi Oliver Wendell Holmes a kwala mola o o maswe, 'Dikokomana tse tharo tsa dieleele di lekane.' Diketekete tsa Ma-Amerika di ne tsa faposiwa kwa ntle ga tumelelo, mme Molao wa Bofaladi wa 1924 o ne wa dirisa kakanyo ya eugenics go kgaphela kwa ntle ditlhopha tse di 'sa batlegeng'.

items: Batswasetlhabelo bontsi jwa bone e ne e le bahumanegi, ba ba golafetseng le ba ba tswang mo ditšhabeng tse dinnye.
Eugenics ya USA e ne e tshegediwa ka madi, e rulagantswe e bile e kgatlhelwa mo boditšhabatšhaba.
Borasaense ba semorafe ba Jeremane ba ne ba ithuta melao ya Amerika ka kelotlhoko jaaka sekao.

media.alt: Noto ya moatlhodi (gavel) e e ikhutsitseng mo tokomaneng e e tshwailweng ka setempe se sehibidu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='48' y='70' width='90' height='70' fill='#fff' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='84' width='66' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='98' width='66' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='112' width='44' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='116' cy='126' r='10' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='150' y='40' width='44' height='18' rx='4' fill='#5c1414' transform='rotate(35 172 49)'/><rect x='150' y='58' width='10' height='40' rx='3' fill='#7a5a3a' transform='rotate(35 155 78)'/></svg>

slides.notes: Se se tsewang ke gore tsela e e isang kwa masetlapelong a Bo-Nazi ga e a simologa kwa Jeremane. USA, temokerasi, e ne ya simolola pholisi ya kgoka ya eugenics, mme badiramolao ba Bo-Nazi ba ne ba umaka melao ya Amerika phatlalatsa fa ba ne ba kwala ya bone. Tshwara nopolo ya Buck v. Bell ka kelotlhoko - e bitse nnete ya hisitori e e tlhabisang ditlhong, e seng thogako e e ka boelediwang go se na sepe. [SME] Netefatsa dipalo tsa go faposiwa (tse gantsi di umakiwang di feta 60,000 mo lekgolong la bo-20 la dingwaga) le kgang ya 'molao wa ntlha' wa Indiana wa 1907 kgatlhanong le motswedi wa SAHO pele ga tlhagiso.

slides.title: Bokoloniale le polao ya morafe ya Baherero le Banama
slides.lead: Kwa German South West Africa (gompieno Namibia), dikakanyo tsa semorafe di ne tsa tlhagisa se bontsi bo se bitsang polao ya morafe ya ntlha ya lekgolo la bo-20 la dingwaga.

blocks.text: Fa merafe ya **Baherero** le **Banama** e ne e tsogologela puso ya bokoloniale ya Jeremane, Molaodimogolo **Lothar von Trotha** o ne a ntsha taelo ya go nyeletsa (1904). Ba ba neng ba falotse ba ne ba lelekelwa kwa sekakeng kgotsa kwa dikampeng tsa go kokoanya batho, kwa diketekete di neng tsa swela teng. Megata ya baswi e ne ya romelwa kwa Jeremane go dirisiwa mo dipatlisisong tsa 'saense ya semorafe'.

items: Ditsebi tsa hisitori di akanya gore Baherero ba ka nna 65,000 le Banama ba ka nna 10,000 ba ne ba bolawa.
Tiori ya semorafe e ne ya bopa sesha polao e kgolo jaaka go tloswa 'ga tlholego' ga batho ba ba 'kwa tlase'.
Dikakanyo tse di tshwanang tsa dikampe le tatelano ya maemo ya semorafe di ne di tla boela gape kwa Yuropa dingwaga tse di masome moragonyana.

media.alt: Molelwane wa sekaka o o bogale o o nang le letsatsi le le kwa tlase, o gakolola sekaka sa Namib.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='104' width='240' height='56' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 104 q60 -22 120 0 t120 0 v56 H0 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><circle cx='170' cy='70' r='22' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M0 132 q80 -14 240 4 v24 H0 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Selaete se se thaya dikakanyo tse di sa bonaleng mo masetlapelong a a bonalang a a nang le kamano e e tlhamaletseng ya kgaolo ya Aforika Borwa (Namibia e ne e laolwa ke Aforika Borwa bontsi jwa lekgolo la bo-20 la dingwaga). Gatelela ntlha e e tshosang ya megata e e neng e romelwa kwa dipatlisisong tsa semorafe - e bontsha saense ya maaka le thubakanyo e kgolo di jesana. Gata mola o o tlhamaletseng wa tswelelo go ya kwa Jeremane ya Bo-Nazi kwa ntle ga go menagantsha ditiragalo tse pedi go nna e le nngwe. [SME] Tlhamo ya 'polao ya morafe ya ntlha ya lekgolo la bo-20 la dingwaga' le dipalo tsa baswi di dirisiwa thata mme di a ganediwa mo bophateng; netefatsa kgatlhanong le atikele ya SAHO ya Herero Revolt.

slides.eyebrow: Puso ya semorafe - Jeremane ya Bo-Nazi
slides.title: 'Morafe o o busang' wa Bo-Nazi
slides.lead: Ba-Nazi ba ne ba aga puso yotlhe mo saenseng ya maaka ya morafe o o busang wa 'Aryan'.

blocks.text: Morago ga 1933, Jeremane ya Bo-Nazi e ne ya dira tatelano ya maemo ya semorafe motheo wa molao. Ba ne ba itlhamela morafe o o busang wa **Aryan** (*Herrenvolk*) mme ba tlhalosa Bajuda, Baroma, batho ba bantsho le ba bangwe jaaka 'baba' ba ba kwa tlase. **Melao ya Nuremberg (1935)** e ne ya amoga Bajuda bonnamaagi mme ya thibela lenyalo fa gare ga Bajuda le Bajeremane ba bangwe - e fetola kgethololo ya semorafe ya saense ya maaka go nna thulaganyo ya semolao ya kgethologanyo.

items: Molao wa 1933 o ne wa letla go faposiwa ka dikgoka ga ba ba 'sa nonofang ka boswa', o ntsha modumo wa eugenics ya USA.
Maano a tsietso (propaganda), dikolo le saense tsotlhe di ne di ruta go beela maemo ga semorafe jaaka nnete.
Kgethologanyo e ne ya oketsega kgato ka kgato: go tloga mo bonnamaaging, go ya mo thotong, go ya mo botshelong ka bosi.

media.alt: Tokomane ya semmuso e e tshwailweng mme morago e gagogantswe ka bobedi, e tshwantshetsa bonnamaagi jo bo tlositsweng ka molao.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='50' y='34' width='54' height='92' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='118' y='34' width='54' height='92' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='48' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='60' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='128' y='48' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='128' y='72' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M104 30 L112 60 L104 90 L112 126' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M118 30 L110 60 L118 90 L110 126' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bontsha baithuti mokgwa o setlhogo sa CAPS se batlang gore ba se tlhaloganye: dikakanyo tsa semorafe di nna 'karolo ya botlhokwa ya pholisi le molao wa puso'. Melao ya Nuremberg ke sekao se se phepafetseng thata - molao o o tlhalosang gore ke mang yo o balwang jaaka motho ka botlalo. Supa mola o o tlhamaletseng go tswa mo selaeteng sa pele sa eugenics ya USA: molao wa go faposa wa Jeremane wa 1933 o ne o sekametse mo melaong ya Amerika mo karolong nngwe. Gatelela mokgwa wa go oketsega ga pogiso - ga e a simologa ka polao, e ne ya simologa ka dipampiri.

slides.title: The Holocaust
slides.lead: Megopolo ya semorafe e ne ya felela ka polao e e rulagantsweng, ya boindaseteri ya dimilione.

blocks.text: Mo nakong ya Ntwa ya Bobedi ya Lefatshe, puso ya Bo-Nazi e ne ya dira **Holocaust** - polao e e neng e rulagantswe ka boomo ya Bajuda ba ka nna **dimilione di le thataro**, mmogo le Baroma, batho ba ba golafetseng, baganetsi ba sepolotiki le ba bangwe ba ba neng ba tsewa ba 'sa tshwanela botshelo'. E ne e le bokhutlo jo bo tshosang jwa lekgolo la dingwaga la kakanyo ya semorafe e e neng ya beela batho maemo mme morago ya dira go ya ka maemo ao.

items: Ba ba golafetseng ba ne ba le mo gare ga batswasetlhabelo ba ntlha, ka lenaneo la pele la 'euthanasia'.
Bobusi jwa botsamaisi, saense le theknoloji di ne tsa dirisiwa go bolaya ka selekanyo sa boindaseteri.
Holocaust e eme jaaka tlhagiso e e feteletseng thata ya kwa dikakanyo tsa semorafe di ka isang teng.

media.alt: Kerese e le nngwe e e tukileng kgatlhanong le bokamorago jo bo lefifi, sesupo sa kgakologelo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#2b2b2b'/><rect x='88' y='72' width='24' height='60' rx='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='96' y='58' width='8' height='16' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M100 22 q14 20 0 36 q-14 -16 0 -36 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M100 34 q7 10 0 20 q-7 -10 0 -20 Z' fill='#fff4d6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Se ke selaete se se tlhwaafetseng thata - se tshware ka boima le kelotlhoko. Nna o tsepame mo tshenyegelong ya batho le mo kgakologelong, e seng mo dintlheng tse di bonalang. Dira ntlha ya tokololo ya gore Holocaust e ne e se botsenwa jwa tshoganyetso mme e ne e le bokhutlo jo bo utlwalang jwa dikakanyo tse baithuti ba di setseng morago thutong yotlhe: go arola, tatelano ya maemo, go ntsha batho botho, kgethologanyo, morago go nyeletsa. Ela tlhoko kaeletso ya go ruta ya SAHO kaga Holocaust mme o golaganye le ditshwanelo tsa botho tse di neng tsa tlhaga morago (Kitsiso ya Lefatshe ya Ditshwanelo tsa Botho ya 1948 le lefoko 'genocide' - polao ya morafe).

slides.eyebrow: Go go tlisa gae - Aforika Borwa
slides.title: Dikakanyo tsa semorafe le Aforika Borwa
slides.lead: Melatswana e e tshwanang ya kakanyo ya semorafe e ne ya bopa kgethologanyo le tlhaolele kwa gae.

blocks.text: Aforika Borwa e ne e le karolo ya kgang e ya lefatshe lotlhe. Dipuso tsa bokoloniale le tsa bakwadibaga di ne tsa dirisa dikakanyo tse di tshwanang tsa saense ya maaka go itshireletsa phenyo, go amogwa ga lefatshe le kgethologanyo. Morago ga 1948, **tlhaolele** e ne ya aga thulaganyo yotlhe ya semolao mo go aroleng ka semorafe - segolo bogolo mo **Molaong wa Kwadiso ya Baagi wa 1950 (Population Registration Act)**, o o neng wa arola motho mongwe le mongwe ka 'morafe' wa semmuso.

items: Ditsebi tsa hisitori gantsi di bapisa melao ya tlhaolele ya bogologolo le molao wa semorafe wa Bo-Nazi.
Mo go tsoopedi, puso, e seng baeoloji, e ne e swetsa gore ke mang yo o leng wa 'morafe' ofe.
Go tlhaloganya saense ya maaka ya semorafe go thusa go tlhalosa gore ke ka ntlha yang tlhaolele e ne e se molemo go tswa kwa moding wa yona.

media.alt: Buka ya boitshupo e e tshwailweng ka setlhopha, e ntsha modumo wa go arola ka semorafe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 160' role='img'><rect width='180' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='45' y='24' width='90' height='112' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='56' y='38' width='34' height='40' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='73' cy='54' r='9' fill='#9aa77f'/><path d='M60 74 q13 -14 26 0 Z' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect x='96' y='42' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='96' y='54' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='56' y='92' width='68' height='16' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='56' y='116' width='52' height='6' fill='#cdd6b5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tlhomamisa botlhokwa jwa setlhogo mo baithuting ba Aforika Borwa: dikakanyo tse di ithutilweng fano e ne e se fela bothata jwa Yuropa, di ne tsa dirisiwa go aga kgethologanyo le tlhaolele kwa gae. Dira papiso e e kelotlhoko le Jeremane ya Bo-Nazi (bobedi ba dirisitse go arola ga puso) mme o ele tlhoko dipharologano - tlhaolele e ne e ikaeletse tirisobotlhaswa e e laolwang le kgaoganyo go na le go nyeletsa. Se se golaganya go ya pele le dikarolo tsa tlhaolele tsa Mophato wa 11 le wa 12.

slides.title: Go tloga mo go aroleng go ya mo masetlapelong

blocks.alt: Tatelano ya nako ya kgolo ya dikakanyo tsa semorafe go tloga ka 1735 go ya go 1950.

events.label: Darwin o gatisa On the Origin of Species
Polao ya morafe ya Baherero le Banama e a simologa
Buck v. Bell wa USA o dumela go faposiwa ka dikgoka
Melao ya go arola ya tlhaolele kwa Aforika Borwa

slides.notes: Dirisa tatelano ya nako go kopanya kgang jaaka ketane ya sesosa le ditlamorago: kakanyo (go arola) e thatafalela go nna saense ya maaka (Social Darwinism, eugenics), e e kwalwang mo molaong (USA, Jeremane ya Bo-Nazi, Aforika Borwa) mme e diragadiwa jaaka thubakanyo (polao ya morafe ya bokoloniale, Holocaust). Kopa baithuti go supa gore ke ditiragalo dife tse e leng 'dikakanyo', dife tse e leng 'melao' le dife tse e leng 'thubakanyo' - go tiisa sebopego sa konokono sa setlhogo pele ga dipotso tsa tshekatsheko.

slides.title: Se re ithutileng sona
slides.lead: Dikakanyo di na le maatla: saense ya maaka ya semorafe, fa e sena go dumelwa le go dirwa molao, e ne ya ja matshelo a dimilione tse di masome.

blocks.text: Mo thutong e re setse morago ka fa 'semorafe' se neng sa **itlhangwa, e seng go fitlhelwa**; ka fa saense ya maaka (Social Darwinism le eugenics) e neng ya naya kgethololo maswao a a tlotlegang; le ka fa, fa dipuso di kwadile dikakanyo tse mo **molaong**, ditlamorago di neng tsa simologa go tswa mo go faposiweng ka dikgoka go ya kwa polaong ya morafe ya bokoloniale le Holocaust. Go ithuta hisitori e ke tlhagiso kaga kotsi ya dikakanyo tse di ntshang batho botho - le tshireletso ya ditshwanelo tsa botho le seriti sa botho.

blocks.label: Q1
blocks.question: Tlhalosa gore ke ka ntlha yang ditsebi tsa hisitori di tlhalosa saense ya semorafe ya lekgolo la bo-19 la dingwaga jaaka 'saense ya maaka'. Bua ka ka fa ditshwetso di neng tsa fitlhelelwa ka teng.

blocks.label: Q2
blocks.question: 'Dikakanyo tsa semorafe di ne tsa nna kotsi tota fela fa dipuso di di fetotse molao.' A o a dumalana? Dirisa bonnye dikai tse pedi go tswa mo thutong e go ema karabo ya gago nokeng.

blocks.label: Q3
blocks.question: Bapisa tsela e semorafe se neng sa dirisiwa ka yona kwa Jeremane ya Bo-Nazi le kwa Aforika Borwa ya tlhaolele. Supa go tshwana go le gongwe le pharologano e le nngwe.

slides.notes: Konela ka go boela kwa kgannyeng ya tshimologo - semorafe ke sebopiwa sa loago se se nang le ditlamorago tsa nnete tse di senyang thata - le ka go tiisa tsibogo ya ditshwanelo tsa botho e e neng ya latela 1945. Dirisa dipotso tse tharo jaaka tekolo e e kwadilweng kgotsa puisano e e rulagantsweng; kabo ya dintlha e latela mekgwa ya CAPS ya go kwala mo go anameng le go bapisa metswedi (Q2 ke serapa se sennye/tlhamo; Q3 e ikatisa bokgoni jwa papiso jo setlhogo se se batlang). Gakolola baithuti gore setlhogo se se thaya dikarolo tsa moragonyana tsa tlhaolele le ditshwanelo tsa botho.
